records.ety: [L. ethicus, Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ custom, usage, character, dwelling; akin to <?/ custom, Goth. sidus, G. sitte, Skr. svadh<?/, prob. orig., one's own doing; sva self + dh<?/ to set: cf. F. thique. See So, Do.]

defs: Of, or belonging to, morals; treating of the moral feelings or duties; containing precepts of morality; moral; as, ethic discourses or epistles; an ethical system; ethical philosophy.
quotes: The ethical meaning of the miracles.
